source_declaration.name: PowerSeries.coeff_mul
source_declaration.source_snippet:
theorem coeff_mul (n : ℕ) (φ ψ : R⟦X⟧) :
    coeff n (φ * ψ) = ∑ p ∈ antidiagonal n, coeff p.1 φ * coeff p.2 ψ := by
  -- `rw` can't see that `PowerSeries = MvPowerSeries Unit`, so use `.trans`
  refine (MvPowerSeries.coeff_mul _ φ ψ).trans ?_
  rw [Finsupp.antidiagonal_single, Finset.sum_map]
  rfl

source_declaration.declaration_line: lemma sum_pow' (s : Finset κ) (f : κ → R) (n : ℕ) :
source_declaration.name: Finset.sum_pow'
source_declaration.source_snippet:
lemma sum_pow' (s : Finset κ) (f : κ → R) (n : ℕ) :
    (∑ a ∈ s, f a) ^ n = ∑ p ∈ piFinset fun _i : Fin n ↦ s, ∏ i, f (p i) := by
  convert @prod_univ_sum (Fin n) _ _ _ _ _ (fun _i ↦ s) fun _i d ↦ f d; simp

/-- The product of `f a + g a` over all of `s` is the sum over the powerset of `s` of the product of
`f` over a subset `t` times the product of `g` over the complement of `t` -/

hydrated_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Fintype.piFinset t = Finset.pi (Finset.univ : Finset ι) t

source_declaration.declaration_line: def piFinset (t : ∀ a, Finset (δ a)) : Finset (∀ a, δ a) :=
source_declaration.name: Fintype.piFinset
source_declaration.source_snippet:
def piFinset (t : ∀ a, Finset (δ a)) : Finset (∀ a, δ a) :=
  (Finset.univ.pi t).map ⟨fun f a => f a (mem_univ a), fun _ _ =>
    by simp +contextual [funext_iff]⟩
